finding_results.notes: Pre-closure stops are now causally distinct and non-swappable: Bhatti provides financial trigger and depot direction, depot provides logged storm-lamp and rail-police clue, pub provides injury escalation plus bridge-post tactic, and bridge constable provides first-aid to infirmary transfer path. Elsie's interim plan and recap explicitly pivot to records-first search steps.

Reworked the emotional-crest exchange into pressure-shaped dialogue with distinct idiolect markers. Elsie now uses concrete bodily/domestic detail under strain, while Noreen shifts to brisk directive support with rough pragmatic cadence. Added restart/interrupt beats to avoid aphoristic polish.
Kept one intentional corrective contrast at line 3, then rewrote the other cited high-attention beats into action-led and image-led constructions to break chapter-level template recurrence.

Retained one full checklist stress beat (line 161). Recast the packing span into mis-sequenced action and bodily disorientation, and recast the dawn plan into a tactile fixation beat rather than an inventory list.

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved the structural engine stall by ending on a concrete Tom status change with immediate tactical consequences, and tightened the pre-closure search chain so each stop contributes unique actionable information that changes Elsie's next move.

Resolved the sole packet finding by revising the emotional-crest exchange to increase colloquial pressure cadence, strengthen voice separation between Elsie and Noreen, and remove interchangeable maxim-like phrasing while preserving scene consequence.

Applied all prose/copyedit packet findings with minimal collateral churn: reduced repetitive corrective-form syntax in key beats, diversified Elsie's stress expression away from repeated task lists, and preserved chapter voice, continuity, and raw register.
